narrative:
Precinct Clinton Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 604 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
